We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 2.6s, d = 19.27m:
t^2 = 2.6 * 2.6:
2.6 * 0.6 = 1.56
2.6 * 2.0 = 5.20
1.56 + 5.20 = 6.76
k = 19.27 / 2.6^2 = 19.27 / 6.76 = 19.27 / 6.76
= 0 + 1 * 1927 / 676
= 1 + 1 * 1251 / 676
= 2 + 1 * 575 / 676
= 2.0 + 0.1 * 5750 / 676
= 2.1 + 0.1 * 5074 / 676
= 2.2 + 0.1 * 4398 / 676
= 2.3 + 0.1 * 3722 / 676
= 2.4 + 0.1 * 3046 / 676
= 2.5 + 0.1 * 2370 / 676
= 2.6 + 0.1 * 1694 / 676
= 2.7 + 0.1 * 1018 / 676
= 2.8 + 0.1 * 342 / 676
= 2.80 + 0.01 * 3420 / 676
= 2.81 + 0.01 * 2744 / 676
= 2.82 + 0.01 * 2068 / 676
= 2.83 + 0.01 * 1392 / 676
= 2.84 + 0.01 * 716 / 676
= 2.85 + 0.01 * 40 / 676
= 2.850 + 0.001 * 400 / 676
= 2.850

t = 1.58s, d = 7.12m:
t^2 = 1.58 * 1.58:
1.58 * 0.08 = 0.1264
1.58 * 0.50 = 0.7900
1.58 * 1.00 = 1.5800
0.1264 + 0.7900 = 0.9164
0.9164 + 1.5800 = 2.4964
k = 7.12 / 1.58^2 = 7.12 / 2.4964 = 7.120 / 2.496
= 0 + 1 * 7120 / 2496
= 1 + 1 * 4624 / 2496
= 2 + 1 * 2128 / 2496
= 2.0 + 0.1 * 21280 / 2496
= 2.1 + 0.1 * 18784 / 2496
= 2.2 + 0.1 * 16288 / 2496
= 2.3 + 0.1 * 13792 / 2496
= 2.4 + 0.1 * 11296 / 2496
= 2.5 + 0.1 * 8800 / 2496
= 2.6 + 0.1 * 6304 / 2496
= 2.7 + 0.1 * 3808 / 2496
= 2.8 + 0.1 * 1312 / 2496
= 2.80 + 0.01 * 13120 / 2496
= 2.81 + 0.01 * 10624 / 2496
= 2.82 + 0.01 * 8128 / 2496
= 2.83 + 0.01 * 5632 / 2496
= 2.84 + 0.01 * 3136 / 2496
= 2.85 + 0.01 * 640 / 2496
= 2.850 + 0.001 * 6400 / 2496
= 2.851 + 0.001 * 3904 / 2496
= 2.852 + 0.001 * 1408 / 2496
= 2.852

t = 2.66s, d = 20.17m:
t^2 = 2.66 * 2.66:
2.66 * 0.06 = 0.1596
2.66 * 0.60 = 1.5960
2.66 * 2.00 = 5.3200
0.1596 + 1.5960 = 1.7556
1.7556 + 5.3200 = 7.0756
k = 20.17 / 2.66^2 = 20.17 / 7.0756 = 20.170 / 7.075
= 0 + 1 * 20170 / 7075
= 1 + 1 * 13095 / 7075
= 2 + 1 * 6020 / 7075
= 2.0 + 0.1 * 60200 / 7075
= 2.1 + 0.1 * 53125 / 7075
= 2.2 + 0.1 * 46050 / 7075
= 2.3 + 0.1 * 38975 / 7075
= 2.4 + 0.1 * 31900 / 7075
= 2.5 + 0.1 * 24825 / 7075
= 2.6 + 0.1 * 17750 / 7075
= 2.7 + 0.1 * 10675 / 7075
= 2.8 + 0.1 * 3600 / 7075
= 2.80 + 0.01 * 36000 / 7075
= 2.81 + 0.01 * 28925 / 7075
= 2.82 + 0.01 * 21850 / 7075
= 2.83 + 0.01 * 14775 / 7075
= 2.84 + 0.01 * 7700 / 7075
= 2.85 + 0.01 * 625 / 7075
= 2.850 + 0.001 * 6250 / 7075
= 2.850

t = 2.85s, d = 23.16m:
t^2 = 2.85 * 2.85:
2.85 * 0.05 = 0.1425
2.85 * 0.80 = 2.2800
2.85 * 2.00 = 5.7000
0.1425 + 2.2800 = 2.4225
2.4225 + 5.7000 = 8.1225
k = 23.16 / 2.85^2 = 23.16 / 8.1225 = 23.160 / 8.122
= 0 + 1 * 23160 / 8122
= 1 + 1 * 15038 / 8122
= 2 + 1 * 6916 / 8122
= 2.0 + 0.1 * 69160 / 8122
= 2.1 + 0.1 * 61038 / 8122
= 2.2 + 0.1 * 52916 / 8122
= 2.3 + 0.1 * 44794 / 8122
= 2.4 + 0.1 * 36672 / 8122
= 2.5 + 0.1 * 28550 / 8122
= 2.6 + 0.1 * 20428 / 8122
= 2.7 + 0.1 * 12306 / 8122
= 2.8 + 0.1 * 4184 / 8122
= 2.80 + 0.01 * 41840 / 8122
= 2.81 + 0.01 * 33718 / 8122
= 2.82 + 0.01 * 25596 / 8122
= 2.83 + 0.01 * 17474 / 8122
= 2.84 + 0.01 * 9352 / 8122
= 2.85 + 0.01 * 1230 / 8122
= 2.850 + 0.001 * 12300 / 8122
= 2.851 + 0.001 * 4178 / 8122
= 2.851

k values: 2.850, 2.852, 2.850, 2.851
k values (sorted): 2.850, 2.850, 2.851, 2.852
The median k is 2.850.

For t = 2.66:
t^2 = 2.66 * 2.66:
2.66 * 0.06 = 0.1596
2.66 * 0.60 = 1.5960
2.66 * 2.00 = 5.3200
0.1596 + 1.5960 = 1.7556
1.7556 + 5.3200 = 7.0756
= 7.0756

d = 2.85 * 7.0756:
2.85 * 0.0006 = 0.001710
2.85 * 0.0050 = 0.014250
2.85 * 0.0700 = 0.199500
2.85 * 7.0000 = 19.950000
0.001710 + 0.014250 = 0.015960
0.015960 + 0.199500 = 0.215460
0.215460 + 19.950000 = 20.165460
= 20.165

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{20.165}
